calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-09-2024 Off Calendar

Notice Of Hearing On Application For Entry Of Court Judgment Including Attorneys' Fees, Pursuant To C.C.P. 1021.5, Against Defendant Mann Lake, Ltd., Or, In The Alternative, Upon Hearing On A Date To Be Set By The Court
Off Calendar Jul-31-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:15 am and concluding at 10:33 am.

Plaintiff Keep America Safe and Beautiful is represented by Laralei Paras, Esq.
Defendant Mann Lake LTD not appearing.

Plaintiff presents summary of facts, claims and an offer of proof.

Matter is submitted.

COURT FINDS:
1. The DOES in this matter were dismissed on May-23-2024
2. Default against Defendant Mann Lake LTD entered on Aug-24-2022
3. Plaintiff's complaint for civil penalties and injunctive relief filed Jul-07-2023
4. Proof of personal service as to Defendant Mann Lake LTD effectuated Jul-31-2023
5. Attorney's fees are reasonable.

Based on the documents filed, the statement made by Plaintiff and its Counsel, consideration and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Keep America Safe and Beautiful, and against Defendant Mann Lake LTD, as follows:

Damages: $5,000.00
Prejudgment Interest: $0
Attorney Fees: $30,795.00
Costs: $5,142.05

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $40,937.05

Furthermore, Pursuant to Health and Safety Code 25249.7(a), Mann Lake is permanently enjoined from offering any tools with vinyl/PVC grips containing diisononyl phthalate ("DINP") in
California without providing clear and reasonable warnings regarding the risks of cancer caused by DINP exposures, as set forth in paragraph 2 below. This includes but is not limited to Economy Ring Clincher, SKU: PP984, UPC: 7 14854 74984 7.

The warning provided pursuant to this Judgment shall state:
!WARNING: This product can expose you to diisononyl phthalate (DINP), which is known to the
State of California to cause cancer. For more information go to www.P65warnings.gov.

The above language should be placed conspicuously on all tools with vinyl grips which contains detectable amounts of DINP or the product packaging.

Proposed judgment signed and filed this date. (D505)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
